items.title: Sources: The Brooklyn Nets will select Joshua Jefferson with the No. 28 pick in the 2026 NBA Draft. Brooklyn acquired this pick from the Minnesota Timberwolves as part of a 3-team deal, which also landed Julius Randle in Brooklyn and sent Nic Claxton to the Chicago Bulls.
items.author: Michael Scotto
items.body_excerpt: Sources: The Brooklyn Nets will select Joshua Jefferson with the No. 28 pick in the 2026 NBA Draft. Brooklyn acquired this pick from the Minnesota Timberwolves as part of a 3-team deal, which also landed Julius Randle in Brooklyn and sent Nic Claxton to the Chicago Bulls.

items.title: Hollinger POTD Richard Jefferson. Arizona SF was drafted 13th in 01 by HOU & traded to NJ, where he spent 7 yrs as key starter. Peaked at 22.2 ppg in 04-05. Bounced around several teams thru 2018 as useful vet. Okay shooter but bouncy & great at D. Won ring w/CLE. Good TV guy.
items.author: HoopsAnalyst
items.body_excerpt: Hollinger POTD Richard Jefferson. Arizona SF was drafted 13th in 01 by HOU & traded to NJ, where he spent 7 yrs as key starter. Peaked at 22.2 ppg in 04-05. Bounced around several teams thru 2018 as useful vet. Okay shooter but bouncy & great at D. Won ring w/CLE. Good TV guy.
